title: Finding Your God-Given Purpose
author: Ministry Team
excerpt: You were created with intention and designed for a purpose. Uncover how to discover and walk in the calling God has placed on your life.
content:
One of the deepest questions of the human heart is, 'Why am I here?' We long for purpose, for meaning that transcends the daily grind. The good news is that God has an answer to this question.

Jeremiah 29:11 offers a profound promise: 'For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.' You are not an accident. You were intentionally created by a loving God who has prepared good works for you to walk in.

Finding your purpose begins not with looking inward, but upward. As you draw closer to God through prayer and His Word, He reveals the unique calling He has placed on your life — a calling that uses your gifts to bless others and bring glory to His name.
